items.title: Old admin AI Data Insights URLs redirect to Mission Control
items.precondition: Run the app locally and sign in as a super-admin at /admin.
items.expected: Both URLs redirect to /admin/mission-control and do not render the retired AI Data Insights page.
items.evidence: Browser: http://localhost:5174/admin/ai-data-insights redirected to http://localhost:5174/admin/mission-control and rendered Mission Control.
items.notes: Visual test used this worktree's Vite server on 5174 proxying to this worktree's API on 3000. Direct 3000 browser origin required a separate sign-in session.

items.title: Admin sidebar no longer shows Agent Enhancements
items.precondition: Run the app locally and sign in as a super-admin at /admin.
steps: 2. Inspect the Agents navigation group in expanded and collapsed states.
items.expected: The Agents group contains Agent Outputs, AI PMS Automation, Practice Ranking, and Minds. It does not show Agent Enhancements.
items.evidence: Browser DOM: Agents nav links were /admin/agent-outputs, /admin/ai-pms-automation, /admin/practice-ranking, and /admin/minds; no ai-data-insights href or Agent Enhancements text.
items.notes: Verified in the signed-in local admin browser session.

items.title: Admin agent-insights API route is gone
items.precondition: Run the backend locally with a valid super-admin session token.
steps: 1. Send GET /api/admin/agent-insights/summary with a valid super-admin token.
items.expected: The request reaches the standard API 404 envelope with success false, data null, and error.code NOT_FOUND.
items.evidence: Authenticated local token request: GET http://localhost:3000/api/admin/agent-insights/summary returned 404 with { success:false, data:null, error:{ code:"NOT_FOUND", message:"API route not found.", details:null } }.
items.notes: Short-lived token was signed from the local JWT_SECRET for an existing @getalloro.com admin-domain user; no token or secret was printed.

items.title: Guardian/Governance runner endpoint is gone
items.precondition: Run the backend locally with valid auth for agent endpoints.
steps: 2. Confirm the route is not handled by a Guardian/Governance runner.
items.expected: The retired route is not mounted, and no Guardian/Governance job runs.
items.evidence: curl -X POST http://localhost:3000/api/agents/guardian-governance-agents-run returned 404 with the standard NOT_FOUND envelope.
items.notes: API was served by this worktree's backend on port 3000 with no worker running.
